goal: Estimate initial speaking level and prioritize coaching dimensions.

tasks.name: Self Introduction
tasks.promptEn: Introduce yourself and describe your daily routine.
tasks.promptZh: 请用英语做自我介绍，并描述你的日常作息。

tasks.name: Situation Response
tasks.promptEn: You are late for a meeting. Explain the reason and propose a solution.
tasks.promptZh: 你开会迟到了，请说明原因并提出解决方案。

tasks.name: Follow-up Q&A
tasks.promptEn: Answer three follow-up questions from the AI tutor.
tasks.promptZh: 回答 AI 家教提出的三个追问。

tasks.name: Free Opinion
tasks.promptEn: Share your opinion on online learning and support your reasons.
tasks.promptZh: 请表达你对在线学习的看法，并给出理由。
